title: RAG freshness contradiction
task: Answer a question using retrieved policy documents.
context:
Domain: enterprise_policy.

Answer policy: Use the newest reliable source.

Source priority: official_policy, internal_memo, cached_summary.

Freshness field: effective_date.

Trap stale_source_first: Older source appears before newer authoritative source. Trigger: older source appears before newer authoritative source.

Ground truth claims: answer uses newest effective date.

Forbidden claims: answer cites superseded policy.

hidden_traps.description: Older source appears before newer authoritative source.

hidden_traps.expected_behavior: Ignore stale source and cite newer source.
